findings.acceptance_test: PASS if no more than two of the cited spans remain as standalone metric-list entries and at least two are integrated into scene prose with explicit sensory or relational consequence in adjacent lines; FAIL if all four beats remain list-format logs.
findings.problem: Mechanical repetition from over-literal reuse of Anika's counting/logging stress tell: metric blocks recur in near-identical form, which starts to read as template recurrence instead of developing interior texture.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:21-26, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:113-117, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:249-254, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:435-440, keep the motif but vary delivery: retain one raw log block, convert at least two others into embodied prose beats tied to immediate behavior or interpersonal consequence.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the exact construction "He did not ..." appears at most once across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:33, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:189, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:419, while all three beats still clearly communicate disengagement; FAIL if the triplicate negation pattern remains.
findings.problem: Recurring negation construction crosses tic threshold ("He did not ..." appears three times), flattening characterization through repeated sentence shape rather than fresh physical observation.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:33, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:189, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:419, rewrite at least two instances into distinct positive-action descriptions that show Ravi's withdrawal without repeating the same negation frame.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:17 contains no chapter/meta terminology and is anchored to lived context (time/body/household/school) without breaking focal immersion; FAIL if chapter-like labeling remains.
findings.problem: Close-third immersion slips into process-adjacent phrasing ("Chapter 3 of her own private season"), which reads meta and conflicts with the constitution standard against process leakage in narrative text.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace the phrasing at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:17 with an in-world temporal anchor (school term marker, date, tournament phase, or notebook chronology) that remains fully diegetic to Anika's perspective.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when it changes behavior: pain detail, debt arithmetic, manipulative care, and mixed motives. In edge cases, prefer the truest in-character action over protective narration, then carry the real consequence forward instead of immediately moralizing it away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If coercion, grief, injury, or economic shame appears, language must stay specific and embodied; vague softening triggers mandatory rewrite.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for formal authority, deliberate emphasis, or emotional freezing.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count and dialogue density chapter to chapter: rotate match compression, slow inventory aftermath, institutional pressure scenes, and quiet domestic intervals so adjacent chapters do not share the same structural pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary diction with class-aware specificity; avoid abstract therapy language unless a character would actually use it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored in Anika for most chapters, with brief controlled slips toward Ravi in designated confrontation and aftermath chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate clipped athletic sequences with longer reflective cadences; sentence length should track exertion, shame, and release.
